V-Data.Description:
Cockpit Motor Yacht - Walk Around Decks – Recent Upgrades Including Paint, Interior Refit – Professionally Maintained – Massive Fybridge Space – A Must See!

Forever Young is a fine example of the exceptional craftsmanship Hargrave Yachts is renowned for. She features 4 Guest Staterooms (1 King, 2 Queens, 3 single beds) plus Crew Accommodations for up to 4 aft. She had a major refit in 2012 and continued upgrades each year including a full service in February 2017 that makes her by far the best deal on the market! Powered by popular CAT 3412e engines, she is sure to take her owners to places they have only dreamed!


SYSTEM TEST VESSEL - NOT FOR SALE

CustomFields.Value: Hargrave Custom Yachts offers a unique blend of quality, value, and customization in the 70 ft - 135 ft size range. Some competitors offer one component and some offer two, but no builder offers all three, and Hargrave quality, value & customization are why that is important to you.

Motor yachts boast many of the same amenities as mega yachts with the same high caliber of service. They range in size from 80 to 165 feet and are suited best for family cruising and chartering. With amble space these yachts offer luxury and comfort while state of the art technology offers the stability to cruise to almost any destinations around the world. They also feature amenities such as Jacuzzi's, swimming pools, and an array of water sport equipment.

Events.EventDescription:
The 42nd Annual St. Petersburg Power & Sailboat Show takes place Thursday, Dec. 5 through Sunday, Dec. 8, 2019 at the Duke Energy Center for the Arts, Mahaffey Theater Yacht Basin and Albert Whitted Park in St. Petersburg, Florida.

Come aboard and explore an extraordinary selection of power boats and sailboats in water and on land. Catch up with boating experts and learn about the latest features and innovations in the marine industry. Show-goers will be excited to find hundreds of power boats and sailboats including family cruisers, runabouts, fishing boats, magnificent sailing yachts, personal watercraft and so much more!

V-Data.Description: Testing testing testing and more testing. Testing again.test

CustomFields.Value: Azimut Yachts is an Italian yacht-manufacturing company based in Avigliana, in the province of Turin. It was established in 1969 by Paolo Vitelli. The company started with sailing boat chartering, later developing into a large luxury yacht building industry.

Charter.Description:
New to the charter market, I LOVE THIS BOAT (ex-Aghassi) is a stunning 145' Christensen accomodating 10 guests in 5 staterooms, including an on-deck master stateroom.


LAYOUT

Well known for its tasteful art deco interior, the one-of-a-kind I LOVE THIS BOAT can accommodate 10 guests in 5 cabins. With features including backlighted glass, decorative rope lighting and shimmering overheads, her interior decor is certainly one of the more unique amongst yachts currently available for charter.


The Master Stateroom is located forward on the main deck, with a private entrance that opens to an office. With neutral creme tones, the stateroom features a king size bed, huge walk in-in closet with washer/dryer, and a large vanity for the Mrs. The master head has a walkthrough shower with a most- inviting waterfall feature.


Four guest cabins are located midship on the lower deck, and while stepping down the elegant staircase with soft plush carpeting, guests will have no problem finding their way to their staterooms with the backlit lighting and exciting artwork. 


Standing in the guest foyer, the two queen cabins are located aft on the port and starboard sides, and are very spacious allowing for guests to fully walk around the beds. The heads are also large with plenty of counter space, a shower and toilet.


The two twin guest cabins are forward of the queen cabins, and feature twin beds large enough for adults to sleep in. These cabins are also spacious and have an ensuite with ample counter space, large shower and toilet. 


I LOVE THIS BOAT is fully air conditioned through out.


SPECIFICATION

  • Length 146 ft / 44.4 m
  • Year Built 2002
  • Sleeping Guests 10
  • Cruising Speeds 10 kts / 18.5 km/h
  • Engines 1180 HP, Twin, 2012, Inboard, Diesel, 8V4000 M60, MTU 104 hrs
  • Beam 28 ft 6 in / 8.4 m
  • Builder Christensen Yachts
  • Crew Captain: Jim Harding + 5
  • Stabilisers Stabilisers
  • VAT Registered No
  • Draft 7 ft 10 in / 2.1 m
  • Designer Christensen/ Paola Smith Interiors
  • Refit 2012
  • Flag United States
  • US Duty Paid Yes


AMENITIES

  • BBQ
  • Coffee machine
  • Deck shower
  • Exercise equipment
  • Fishing gear - light
  • Jacuzzi on deck
  • Swim platform
  • Water maker
Charter.Toys: She features an array of tenders and toys, including a 2017 28' Boston Whaler, an 18' Novurania, 2 waverunners, paddleboards, and kayaks for maximizing guests' time in the water.

V-Data.NavalDesigner: Roberto Del Re and Fipa Italiana Yachts
V-Data.Tenders:
- 19’ (5.8m) center console Novurania tender with new outboard engine 60HP on the flybridge.
- 9’5” (2.9m) Cholamark RIB rescue/crew tender with 9.9HP  Yamaha outboard
V-Data.Description:
The 103-foot (31.5m) Maiora 31DP motor yacht AVELINE features a timeless Italian-style exterior and a luxuriously modern interior

Motor yacht AVELINE showcases a contemporary interior with modern light oak to give her a bright, fresh feel. Her light-colored, neutral furnishings provide an open, airy ambiance while her dark wood accents in the formal dining give the feeling of rich elegance. The luxury motor yacht has an excellent main-deck layout that allows guests to watch the big screen satellite HDTV in the main salon without disturbing a dinner party in the formal dining area. Her raised pilothouse provides more interior volume and outstanding visibility for the captain. AVELINE's raised pilothouse offers the additional volume required for a separate dining room and day head on the main deck.

AVELINE offers accommodations for eight guests in four sumptuous staterooms. Her beautiful master suite, located amidships for absolute comfort, is accompanied with a stunning en-suite bath adorned with fine Italian marble and features his-and-hers sinks, a shower and Jacuzzi tub. The luxury yachts additional staterooms include a queen VIP and two twin staterooms. Each stateroom is complete with an en-suite bath finished with Italian marble and its own AV system.

For days spent enjoying the alfresco lifestyle, luxury yacht AVELINE features luxurious outdoor living areas. Her flybridge is the ideal place to relax and dine alfresco showcasing a large sun pad, wet bar and dining for eight. She has a removable Bimini top that allows for the convertible option of sun or shade. Additionally, AVELINE's fully covered aft deck is a perfect place to entertain, if more shade is required the crew can extend the electric awning. Featuring an aft garage, motor yacht AVELINE can easily stow water toys, dive tanks and other equipment. The garage also features a large ice machine as well as a washer and dryer.

The separation between guests and crew is phenomenal on board; crew can move about easily while providing exceptional privacy to guests.

AVELINE was built for fast cruising with a top speed of 23 knots and a fast cruising speed of 20 knots. An economical cruising speed of 12 knots enables a 1,200 nautical-mile-range. Featuring CMC electric Zero-Speed stabilizers, this luxury yacht provides the ultimate in comfort while aboard.

Features

  • Beautifully presented and maintained by five full-time crew and overseen by a management company
  • Upgraded Furuno electronics suite and underwater lights
  • Extra diesel tankage was increased during build giving a total of 16,000 liters with a 1,200 nautical-mile at 12 knots. This is a very nice feature of the yacht, which has a top speed of 23 knots
  • Hamann Black water and gray water treatment allowing access to marine reserves
  • CMC electric stabilizers working underway and at Zero-Speed
  • Aft garage for toys and a generous swim platform for water sport activities
  • Cradle on bow
  • Central swimming ladder
  • Garage access on the teak platform with electric opening hatch
  • Twin port + starboard showers
  • The commercial ice maker in the garage.
  • 2 x Liebherr fridge freezer
  • Ha Mann black water treatment
  • 6 x underwater lights
V-Data.Included_Toys: New Yamaha Jetski EX sport on bow cradle

Features.Feature: CMC electric zero speed fin stabilizers
Twin gensets and extended diesel tankage

Charter.Description:
The 103-foot (31.5) charter yacht AVELINE offers the perfect charter yacht for those wishing to enjoy privacy and luxury.


AVELINE will allow her guests to enjoy the alfresco lifestyle while aboard. Showcasing a luxurious flybridge charter guests can dine alfresco with the cruising destination as the backdrop as well as sunbathe on the large sunpads. With a removable Bimini top, charter guests will have the option for sun and shade as desired. The luxury charter yacht provides an additional alfresco dining option on the main deck aft. A few steps down from the main deck aft is a sensational swim platform, where charter guests can dive into the serene blue water and spend the afternoon enjoying the yacht’s array of water toys.


Motor yacht AVELINE’s interior evokes relaxation. As soon as charter guests step inside, the light, airy ambiance will make them feel at home. The luxury yacht showcases a contemporary, elegant styling that is adorned with modern light oak, light-colored, neutral furnishings and dark wood accents. AVELINE’s main deck has a desirable layout, which allows for children to watch TV on big screen satellite HDTV while the adults enjoy a delectable meal by the chef in the formal dining. Furthermore, the charter yacht has an exceptional volume throughout. The raised pilothouse design provides the additional volume for the separate formal dining and day head on the main deck.


Charter yacht AVELINE welcomes eight guests in the comfort of four nicely appointed staterooms. The yacht’s master stateroom, located amidships on the lower deck, provides the utmost comfort. The stateroom features a plush double bed and en-suite bath with his-and-hers sinks, a shower and a Jacuzzi tub — it is adorned with fine Italian marble. AVELINE’s additional guest staterooms include a queen VIP stateroom and two twin-bed staterooms that are all accompanied by an en-suite bath with Italian marble and its own AV system.


While aboard, the crew will provide guests five-star service and ensure everyone has a holiday to remember. Additionally, the motor yacht’s layout allows the yacht’s crewmembers to move around easily while providing the utmost privacy to guests.
Charter.Toys:
19’ (5.8m) center console Novurania tender with new outboard engine 60HP

9’5” (2.9m) Cholamark RIB rescue/crew tender with 9.9HP Yamaha outboard

1x Yamaha Jetski EX sport (2019)

2x Wakeboard

2x Stand Up Paddle board

2x 2-person kayak

Towable toys such as Donut

4x Diving equipment (rendez-vous diving)

4X4 Swimming Pool with net

Snorkeling gear

V-Data.Tenders:
15’ (4.8m) Novurania RIB with 4-stroke 60HP Yamaha outboard
Plus crew tender
V-Data.Description:
The 112-foot (34m) luxury Motor Yacht XANADU OF LONDON has been fully refitted (2019) to the highest of standards. Completely overhauled, resprayed, fitted with new teak decks and an upgrade of systems, her freshly updated interior and functional lay-out allow for sophisticated entertaining, socializing and dining.

Charter Motor Yacht XANADU OF LONDON showcases vibrant artwork, rich high-gloss woods and plush furnishings to create a classic and elegant ambiance. Uniquely, the yacht’s formal dining is located aft of the main salon, allowing diners fantastic views from the aft windows while enjoying dinner.

Welcoming eight guests, XANADU OF LONDON offers four luxurious staterooms. Her full-beam, main-deck master suite is fitted with a skylight to dazzle stargazers, and includes a king-size bed, en-suite bathroom with gold-plated fixtures, and a private office with an optional sofa bed for a 9th adult or child guest. The stately motor yacht’s VIP stateroom and additional two double staterooms, are located on the lower deck, and complete with their own en-suite bathrooms.

Luxury Motor Yacht XANADU OF LONDON’s flybridge provides space for relaxing with family and friends. Complete with a bar, barbeque, sunpads, alfresco dining and sensational views of your cruising destination, everyone will enjoy time spent on deck.

Water toys such as kayaks, paddle boards add extra fun and excitement to any Southeast Asia charter holiday

To unwind, XANADU OF LONDON features a sauna on the lower deck, providing leisurely relaxation. Ensuring comfortable cruising, XANADU OF LONDON is equipped with Naiad Zero Speed stabilizers.
V-Data.Included_Toys:
1x Yamaha Jetski FX Cruiser
2x Stand-Up-Paddle Boards
2x Kayaks
Towable Toys
Snorkeling Equipment

Charter.Description:
The 112-foot (34m) XANADU OF LONDON has been fully refitted (2019) to the highest of standards. Completely overhauled, resprayed, fitted with new teak decks and an upgrade of systems, her freshly updated interior and functional lay-out allow for sophisticated entertaining, socializing and dining.

XANADU OF LONDON showcases vibrant artwork, rich high-gloss woods and plush furnishings to create an elegant ambiance. Uniquely, the yacht’s formal dining is located aft of the main salon, allowing diners fantastic views from the aft windows while enjoying dinner.

Welcoming eight guests, XANADU OF LONDON offers four luxurious staterooms. Her full-beam, main-deck master suite is fitted with a skylight to dazzle stargazers, and includes a king-size bed, en-suite bathroom with gold-plated fixtures, and a private office with an optional sofa bed for a 9th adult or child guest. The stately yacht’s VIP and additional two double staterooms, are located on the lower deck, and complete with their own en-suite bathrooms.


Motor yacht XANADU OF LONDON’s flybridge provides space for relaxing with family and friends. Complete with a bar, barbeque, sunpads, alfresco dining and sensational views of your cruising destination, everyone will enjoy time spent on deck.

To further unwind, XANADU OF LONDON features a sauna on the lower deck, providing leisurely relaxation.

Ensuring comfortable cruising, XANADU OF LONDON is equipped with Naiad Zero Speed stabilizers.

Her cruising location is SE Asia and includes Thailand, Malaysia and Myanmar.
Charter.Toys:
1x 15’ (4.8m) Novurania RIB with 60hp Yamaha outboard

1x Crew tender

1x Yamaha Jetski FX Cruiser

2x Stand-Up-Paddle Boards

2x Kayaks

Towable Toys

Snorkeling Equipment

V-Data.Description:
Charter yacht MAXXX is an impressive Sunseeker motor yacht that offers guests large interior volume, a convenient layout and remarkable amenities for guest enjoyment.

The motor yacht’s spacious interior has a welcoming ambiance and an abundance of natural light that will make charter guests feel at home. Adorned with contemporary furniture, guests are able to relax and socialize in the utmost comfort.

MAXXX also has a lovely interior dining space where charter guests will enjoy delectable meals prepared by the yacht’s chef.


MAXXX welcomes up to eight guests in four beautifully appointed staterooms and offers versatility with its layout. The charter yacht showcases a serene master stateroom with a plush double bed, sofa and large walk-in closet. Entered via a private entrance from the helm area MAXXX’s VIP stateroom is as impressive as her master. This stateroom also offers a double bed, seating area and walk-in closet. MAXXX’s additional staterooms are one twin and one convertible twin or double-bed stateroom. Each of the motor yacht's staterooms offer en-suite facilities.


Charter yacht MAXXX is perfect for island-hopping over any distance between Phuket, Thailand and Langkawi, Malaysia and the Mergui Archipelago of Myanmar. Cruising at 23 knots and having a top speed of 30 knots, she keeps the adrenaline pumping. Guests can experience an exhilarating open-air ride from the flybridge or enjoy the scenery from seating areas both fore and aft. During the hot hours of the day, guests can relax on the covered decks or freshen up with a dip in the Jacuzzi on the flybridge, under the shelter of an additional, retractable awning.


In addition to the ultimate in comfort, this charter yacht offers an array of water toys that will have guests enjoying their time on the water all day long.
V-Data.Included_Toys:
SeaDoo Jetski 300hp with sound system  
1X 2-person kayak 
1x SUP 
Towable toys such as donut 
Snorkeling equipment 
Fishing equipment 
Rendezvous diving

Cruising at 23 knots and having a top speed of 30 knots, she keeps the adrenaline pumping. Guests can experience an exhilarating open-air ride from the flybridge or enjoy the scenery from seating areas both fore and aft. During the hot hours of the day, guests can relax on the covered decks or freshen up with a dip in the Jacuzzi on the flybridge, under the shelter of an additional, retractable awning.


In addition to the ultimate in comfort, this charter yacht offers an array of water toys that will have guests enjoying their time on the water all day long.
Charter.Toys:
1x 4.8 m Tender, 60hp 4-stroke Suzuki (2018) 


SeaDoo Jetski 300hp with reverse and sound system  

1X 2-person kayak 

1x SUP 

Towable toys such as donut 

Snorkeling equipment 

Fishing equipment 

Rendezvous diving
